Module 6 - Lesson 4
Maximization Offer #3: The 	Mid-Tier Add-On

-- 1 of 2 --

Module 6 - Lesson 4
Elements Of The Mid-Tier Add-On Offer:!
•Congruent With Customer Captivation Offer!
•Adds Value To Customer Captivation Offer!
•Does NOT Imply Customer Captivation Is Incomplete!
•Priced Between $297-$497 With Three-Pay Option!
•Presented As VSL (With ATC Delay) or Long-Form
Sales Letter
Maximization Offer #3: The Mid-Tier 	Add-On
